summary: All 19 backend API tests passed for section-tasks feature. Tested all 6 section keys (dough_section, packing_section, angels_prep, cleaning_facilities, supervisor, sales_team) for GET/PUT operations, validation of invalid sections, data persistence, and authentication requirements. Existing staff-list and cleaning-tasks endpoints verified working.
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix in section_tasks collection for dough_section and other sections during test runs
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 section-tasks APIs are working correctly. Tests verified: (1) GET returns empty/default structure for new sections, (2) PUT saves daily_tasks and weekly_tasks, (3) GET returns saved data after PUT, (4) Invalid section keys return 400, (5) All 6 section keys accept PUT/GET, (6) Existing staff-list and cleaning-tasks endpoints still work, (7) Authentication is required. The test file at /app/backend/tests/test_section_tasks.py can be reused for regression testing.
